What I Do

Capabilities &
Expertise

06

01

Product Design Direction

End-to-end creative and technical leadership — from concept sketches through tech packs, vendor sampling, and production sign-off across multiple product categories.

RhinoAdobe PhotoshopAdobe IllustratorSpreadsheetGoogle SlidesTech Packs

02

Range Architecture

Building commercially balanced collections — seasonal planning, SKU structure, category mix, pricing ladders, and sell-through optimisation.

Assortment PlanningExcel / SheetsMarket Benchmarking

03

Process Improvement

Diagnosing operational bottlenecks across design and development workflows. Building frameworks that reduce revision loops and accelerate cross-team timelines.

Root Cause AnalysisWorkflow MappingTeam Optimisation

04

Brand Strategy & Consulting

Brand Health Check diagnostics and strategic advisory covering positioning, product strategy, and sales acceleration for founders and leadership teams.

Brand DiagnosisMarket AnalysisSales Strategy

05

Cross-Functional Leadership

Managing and aligning design, sourcing, textile development, and production teams — building coordination structures that keep multi-team projects on track.

Team SupervisionVendor NegotiationStakeholder Comms

06

Material & Production

Deep knowledge of fabrication, garment construction, and sourcing across bags, apparel, accessories, and prayer garments. Production coordination across Indonesia, Italy, Portugal, and Korea.

SourcingQCVendor Memos3D Mockup

About

Design with intent.
Lead with clarity.

I'm a fashion product designer and strategic lead based in Indonesia, with 7+ years building collections and the commercial frameworks behind them. My work sits at the intersection of creative craft and business thinking.

Through BIAE Catalyst I help brands diagnose growth blockers and build clearer paths forward. Open to senior creative, product, and strategic leadership roles globally.
